Along the walking paths going southbound, at the top of the steepest hill on the left side of the paved walking path are many blackberry bushes with generous summer yield. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
There are some Blueberries off the path on Lenape Trail Access: Public.
Group of raspberries on the yellow trail in Eagle Rock Reservation Access: Public.
